case_title: CAPIZZI, ARLENE IND et al vs. SALZ, PETER et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-19-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-19-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED. HEARING SET FOR DEC-19-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
